code: const DEFAULT_ADMIN_EMAIL='admin@elitehotels.com';export function getAdminEmail(){return(process.env.REACT_APP_ADMIN_EMAIL||DEFAULT_ADMIN_EMAIL).trim().toLowerCase();}export function isAdminUser(user){if(!user){return false;}if(user.is_admin===true){return true;}return String(user.email||'').trim().toLowerCase()===getAdminEmail();}export function getStoredUser(){try{const rawUser=localStorage.getItem('user');if(!rawUser){return null;}return JSON.parse(rawUser);}catch(error){return null;}}
